import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  match parts.get(0)
  when Some(a_str)
    match parts.get(1)
    when Some(b_str)
      match string.parse_int(a_str)
      when Some(a)
        match string.parse_int(b_str)
        when Some(b)
          let r = a * a + b * b
          println("r=#{r}")
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
